settings.title: Remote-Controlled Navigation
settings.description: MGI's Zip X5 navigates the course autonomously with gyroscope-guided straight tracking, so your bag follows you hands-free.

settings.title: Lithium Power. All Day Long.
settings.description: A high-performance lithium battery delivers up to 36 holes of power on a single charge — plenty for even your longest days at Northcrest.

settings.title: Built to Handle Any Terrain
settings.description: All-terrain wheels, uphill power boost, and a downhill speed control system ensure smooth performance on any slope or surface.

settings.title: MGI Zip X5
settings.hero_sub2: Available at Northcrest Golf · Atlanta, GA
settings.intro_body: MGI has engineered the most advanced electric golf caddy on the market. The Zip X5's remote navigation, lithium battery, and rugged all-terrain design make walking 18 holes easier than ever. Ditch the cart and rediscover the game the way it was meant to be played — available now at Northcrest.
settings.excl_text: Northcrest is proud to carry the MGI Zip X5 and select MGI accessories. Come see it in person at our pro shop — our team can demonstrate the full feature set and help you configure the right setup for your walking game.
settings.cta_sub: Stop by the Northcrest pro shop to see the MGI Zip X5 in action, or reach out to check current availability and pricing.
settings.collection_sub: Select a model below to learn more
